model.name: routingSlip
model.title: Routing Slip
model.description: Routes a message through a series of steps that are pre-determined (the slip)
model.label: eip,routing

id.description: Sets the id of this node

note.description: Sets the note of this node

description.description: Sets the description of this node

disabled.label: advanced
disabled.description: Disables this EIP from the route.

expression.description: Expression to define the routing slip, which defines which endpoints to route the message in a pipeline style. Notice the expression is evaluated once, if you want a more dynamic style, then the dynamic router eip is a better choice.

uriDelimiter.description: The delimiter used to separate endpoint URIs in the routing slip expression. Default is comma.

ignoreInvalidEndpoints.label: advanced
ignoreInvalidEndpoints.description: If enabled then invalid endpoint URIs are ignored and logged instead of throwing an exception.

cacheSize.label: advanced
cacheSize.description: Configures the cache size for ProducerCache which caches producers for reuse. The default cache size is 1000. Set to -1 to turn off caching.

CamelSlipEndpoint.label: producer
CamelSlipEndpoint.description: The endpoint uri of this routing slip

CamelToEndpoint.label: producer
CamelToEndpoint.description: Endpoint URI where this Exchange is being sent to
